channel.title: Citation Building on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant
channel.description: Recent content in Citation Building on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant

item.title: Cassie's: Local SEO for a 5-location adult entertainment business, with every standard playbook tool unavailable
item.description: Daniel operated Cassie’s across five Australian locations. The adult industry classification removed most standard local SEO tools from the available options. The engagement delivered a prioritized plan that worked within those constraints.

item.title: Acryl Design: The Winnipeg signs company outranked by directories it didn't know existed
item.description: A full local SEO audit of a Winnipeg plastic fabrication and custom signage company found 32 active citations, 5 duplicates creating NAP conflicts, and 61 confirmed citation opportunities the business had never claimed. The primary target keyword — ‘signs winnipeg’ (140/mo, KD 25) — was being captured by aggregator directories the client didn’t control.
